info.title: Enterprise Platform REST API
info.description: REST supplementary routes for the enterprise React platform BFF. GraphQL is the primary client boundary per ADR-0013; these routes cover health probes, auth, session management, FQDN-based tenant routing, per-tenant branding, auth settings self-service, and tenant provisioning. ADRs 0028–0031 govern the multi-tenant architecture.

503.description: One or more dependencies not ready

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of entries to return

get.summary: Initiate OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code + PKCE login

parameters.name: returnTo
parameters.description: Relative path to redirect to after successful login

302.description: Redirect to app after session creation

400.description: Invalid state, code, or missing pre-auth cookie

409.description: Email already registered under a different identity provider

502.description: Token exchange or userinfo call failed

post.summary: Destroy server-side session and clear cookie

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's organisation profile

get.description: Called by Caddy before proxying admin/tool UIs. NOT externally reachable — blocked in Caddyfile public blocks. Requires X-Internal-Secret header. Returns 200 (allow), 401 (no session), 403 (forbidden), or 503 (misconfigured). ADR-0029, ADR-0030, ADR-0031.

Unauthenticated. Lists the enabled login options the React /login selector should render (platform plus any enabled brokered third-party providers). Environment/mode aware; contains no secrets. Each item links to the BFF handoff /auth/login?provider=. ADR-ACT-0157.
Returns theme config (logo, colours, displayName) resolved from the tenant schema via Host header. Falls back to platform defaults if tenant not found or schema not seeded. ADR-0029 §4.
Returns configured IdPs for the tenant realm derived from the Host header. Requires admin.access permission. ADR-0030 §1b.

post.description: Creates or updates an IdP in the tenant Keycloak realm. Realm derived from Host header — never from body. ADR-0030 §1b.

get.summary: Tenant lookup for operator consoles (system operator)
get.description: Read-only id/slug/displayName lookup over the organisation registry, optional ?q= filter, capped. No secrets; not tenant lifecycle. ADR-ACT-0255.

post.description: Provisions all tenant infrastructure: PostgreSQL schema, Keycloak realm, Redis ACL user, S3 bucket policy. Per-resource tiers configurable (shared/dedicated/external/air-gapped). System-admin only. ADR-0029, ADR-0031.

resources.description: Per-resource tier configuration. Defaults to shared for all resources if omitted.

get.description: Returns the per-resource tier configuration for the specified tenant. System-admin only. ADR-0031.

post.description: Hierarchical tenant provisioning — tracked in ADR-ACT-0143. Returns 501 until implemented.

409.description: DOMAIN_ALREADY_CLAIMED — the domain is enabled for another organisation; no token is issued (ADR-ACT-0236)
DOMAIN_ALREADY_CLAIMED — the domain is enabled for another organisation; verification is refused before any DNS lookup (ADR-ACT-0236)

get.summary: List tenant members and pending invitations
List Keycloak groups in tenant realm

get.description: Classifies the per-tenant realm-admin credential (configured / missing_credential / invalid_credential / forbidden_realm_operation / realm_unreachable) so the admin UI can offer editing only when safe. Tenant-scoped; never returns the credential. ADR-0041.

post.summary: Attach a per-tenant auth settings credential
post.description: Operator-seeded attach/rotate of a per-tenant Keycloak realm-admin service-account credential, for tenants that predate automated provisioning. System-admin only (global scope), separate from the tenant-admin mutation path. The credential is validated against the realm before storage and is never returned, logged, or audited. ADR-0041.

clientSecret.description: Write-only; validated then stored encrypted, never returned.

patch.description: Updates a realm IdP. clientSecret is write-only; a blank/absent clientSecret preserves the existing secret. Never returns the secret. ADR-0043.

post.summary: Import and validate an OIDC discovery document
post.description: Fetches the issuer/discovery URL (bounded timeout + size cap, HTTPS-only outside local) and returns a minimal redacted projection + classified validation. Never returns the raw document or a secret. ADR-0046.

400.description: Validation error or no tenant context

get.summary: Get the brokered callback URL for an identity provider
get.description: Returns the Keycloak broker callback URL derived from the tenant realm + alias. No secret. ADR-0046.

post.description: Non-interactive probe: re-validates the stored issuer's discovery + JWKS and audits the classified result. Not a login simulation. ADR-0046.

get.description: Returns the bounded claim and group/role mapping managed for the IdP. No secret. ADR-0046.

patch.description: Full-replace of the managed (oidc-ent:) IdP mappers (audit-first). Role targets allowlisted to tenant roles. ADR-0046.

get.summary: Get a tenant's auth-settings credential readiness + metadata
get.description: System-admin (global). Returns readiness status + secret-free lifecycle metadata (clientId, last validated/rotated, rotated by). ADR-0044.

post.description: System-admin (global). Validates the new credential against the tenant realm BEFORE storing; on failure the existing credential is preserved. Secret never returned/logged/audited. ADR-0044.

clientSecret.description: Write-only; validated then stored encrypted, never returned.

post.description: System-admin (global). Operator-provided repair for a missing/broken credential; validates before storing. Secret never returned/logged/audited. ADR-0044.

clientSecret.description: Write-only; validated then stored encrypted, never returned.

get.description: Returns the redacted email sender settings + readiness for the tenant (FQDN/session). Never returns the secret. ADR-0047.

patch.description: Updates the sender config (audit-first). smtpPassword/apiKey are write-only; a blank/absent secret preserves the stored one. ADR-0047.

400.description: Validation error or no tenant context

get.description: Returns the classified email sender readiness status. Never faked. ADR-0047.

post.summary: Send a test email via the tenant sender
post.description: Sends a test message to a supplied recipient via the configured provider; audit-first; classified result; never exposes the secret. ADR-0047.

400.description: Validation error or no tenant context

get.description: Lists the tenant's custom domains with honest per-domain verification, TLS, and routing status (FQDN/session). ADR-0048.

post.summary: Add a tenant custom domain (create ownership challenge)
post.description: Creates a DNS-TXT ownership challenge for a domain (audit-first). Returns the PUBLIC TXT record + token to publish. Tenant authority is FQDN/session, never the body. ADR-0048.

400.description: Validation error or no tenant context

409.description: DOMAIN_ALREADY_CLAIMED — the domain is enabled for another organisation; no token is issued (ADR-ACT-0236)

get.description: Returns the classified custom-domain readiness (no_domains / pending_verification / verified / degraded). Never faked. ADR-0048.

post.summary: Verify a tenant custom domain via DNS
post.description: Performs a bounded DNS-TXT lookup and classifies the result (verified / dns_mismatch / pending_dns); audit-first on success. ADR-0048.

409.description: DOMAIN_ALREADY_CLAIMED — the domain is enabled for another organisation; verification is refused before any DNS lookup (ADR-ACT-0236)

delete.description: Removes the domain from the tenant auth client (audit-first). Tenant authority is FQDN/session. ADR-0048.

400.description: Validation error or no tenant context

get.description: Returns the classified storage readiness (configured / not_configured / provider_unreachable / isolation_failed). Runs a live write/read/delete probe when configured; never returns a credential; never faked. ADR-0049.

post.description: Operator-triggered live write/read/delete probe under the tenant key prefix plus a foreign-key isolation check (audit-first). Returns the per-step result; never returns a credential. ADR-0049.

get.description: Returns the classified observability readiness from a bounded, tenant-scoped Loki log query plus a structural high-cardinality-label guard. No log line or label value is returned; never faked. ADR-0050.

post.summary: Record a usage meter event (system operator / internal)
post.description: Operator/internal ingestion. Idempotent by tenant+meter+idempotencyKey; requires the meter's capability entitlement. Tenant self-ingestion is intentionally not exposed (usage/quota integrity). ADR-0067 / ADR-ACT-0256.

400.description: Validation error or invalid tenant id

403.description: Not entitled to the meter's capability

get.description: Per-meter lifetime usage for the calling tenant (RLS-scoped). No secrets. ADR-ACT-0256.
Operator read of a tenant's per-meter usage. ADR-ACT-0256.

get.summary: Tenant's own quotas + live usage state (read-only)
get.description: Per-quota limit, window, current usage, and allow/deny state for the calling tenant. Server-authoritative; React only renders this. ADR-0067 / ADR-ACT-0256.
Operator read of a tenant's quotas with live usage/state. ADR-ACT-0256.

patch.description: Operator-only, audited. Binds entitlement + meter + limit + window + action. Tenants can never set quotas. ADR-0067 / ADR-ACT-0256.

400.description: Validation error or invalid tenant id

get.summary: List the tenant's own API keys (read-only)
get.description: Tenant self-service list of API keys (RLS-scoped). Never returns the secret or the stored hash. ADR-0065 / ADR-ACT-0257.

post.description: Server-generates a key; the plaintext secret is returned EXACTLY ONCE and only a salted+peppered hash is stored. Requires the api_access entitlement (deny-by-default). Audited. ADR-0065 / ADR-ACT-0257.

400.description: Validation error or no tenant context

403.description: Tenant not entitled to programmatic API access

delete.summary: Revoke one of the tenant's own API keys
delete.description: Tenant self-service revoke (audited). A revoked key can never authenticate again. ADR-0065 / ADR-ACT-0257.

400.description: Invalid key id or no tenant context

get.description: Non-secret summary of the tenant's programmatic-access posture and where to find the API surface (GraphQL + REST baseline). ADR-0065 / ADR-ACT-0257.

get.summary: Tenant's own rate-limit policies + live window count (read-only)
get.description: Per-policy limit, window, current usage, and derived state for the calling tenant. Server-authoritative. ADR-0065 / ADR-ACT-0257.

get.summary: List a tenant's API keys (system operator)
get.description: Operator read of a tenant's API keys. Never returns secrets or hashes. ADR-0065 / ADR-ACT-0257.
Operator read of a tenant's rate-limit policies with live window counts. ADR-0065 / ADR-ACT-0257.

patch.summary: Set a tenant rate-limit policy (system operator)
patch.description: Operator-only, audited. Binds entitlement + limit + window + action. Reuses the entitlement substrate (entitlement before limit). Tenants can never set rate limits. ADR-0065 / ADR-ACT-0257.

400.description: Validation error or invalid tenant id

post.description: Built-in Postgres full-text search, RLS-isolated + permission-aware. `q` is plain text (parsed server-side via plainto_tsquery). Returns no body or secret fields. ADR-0060 / ADR-ACT-0258.

400.description: No tenant context or invalid/empty query

get.description: Operator view of the search engine status (postgres-fts). Never faked: `blocked` if the store is unreachable, `degraded` if empty. ADR-0060 / ADR-ACT-0258.

post.summary: Reindex a tenant's search documents (system operator)
post.description: Operator-only, audited. Rebuilds the tsvector for a tenant's documents. ADR-0060 / ADR-ACT-0258.

400.description: Validation error or invalid tenant id

get.description: Operator read of the durable outbox for a tenant (requires ?organisationId). No secret payload fields. ADR-0059 / ADR-ACT-0259.

get.summary: List a tenant's dead-lettered events (system operator)
get.description: Operator read of events that exhausted retries (requires ?organisationId). ADR-0059 / ADR-ACT-0259.

post.description: Operator-only, audited. Re-enqueues a dead letter as a fresh pending event. `eventId` is the dead-letter id. ADR-0059 / ADR-ACT-0259.

404.description: Dead letter not found or already redriven

get.description: Operator view of registered workers with a derived liveness status (alive/stale/stopped). ADR-0059 / ADR-ACT-0259.

get.summary: Get the calling user's own profile
get.description: End-user self-service. The user_id is the session subject — own profile only. ADR-0068 / ADR-ACT-0260.

patch.summary: Update the calling user's own profile
patch.description: Own profile only (audited). Validated display name + locale + timezone. ADR-0068 / ADR-ACT-0260.

400.description: Validation error or no tenant context

get.summary: Get the calling user's notification preferences
get.description: Own preferences only (tenant + user scoped). ADR-0068 / ADR-ACT-0260.

patch.summary: Update the calling user's notification preferences
patch.description: Own preferences only (audited). Per (channel, category) enable flags. ADR-0068 / ADR-ACT-0260.

400.description: Validation error or no tenant context

get.description: Operator view of local channel transports (never faked). ADR-0068 / ADR-ACT-0260.

post.summary: Send a test notification to a user (system operator)
post.description: Operator-only, audited. Dispatches via the LOCAL adapter; a disabled channel is suppressed; no secret payload. ADR-0068 / ADR-ACT-0260.

400.description: Validation error or invalid tenant id

get.summary: List a tenant's metric signals (system operator)
get.description: Operator read of the built-in metric-signal registry + latest sample for a tenant (requires ?organisationId). No secret fields. ADR-0062 / ADR-ACT-0261.

get.summary: List a tenant's alert rules (system operator)
get.description: Operator read of threshold alert rules (requires ?organisationId). ADR-0062 / ADR-ACT-0261.

post.description: Operator-only, audited. Threshold rule over a signal with a notification target. ADR-0062 / ADR-ACT-0261.

post.summary: Evaluate an alert rule now (system operator)
post.description: Evaluates the rule against the signal's latest sample. A fired rule opens an incident and dispatches a preference-gated notification. ADR-0062 / ADR-ACT-0261.

get.description: Operator read of incident lifecycle records (requires ?organisationId). ADR-0062 / ADR-ACT-0261.

patch.description: Operator-only, audited lifecycle transition (open → acknowledged → resolved). ADR-0062 / ADR-ACT-0261.

get.description: Operator view of the observability backend (built-in). Never faked: blocked if unreachable, degraded if no signals. ADR-0062 / ADR-ACT-0261.
Tenant read of its own entitlement state (RLS-scoped). Deny-by-default: a missing grant reads as not_granted. No self-grant. ADR-0058 / ADR-ACT-0254.
System-operator read of a tenant's entitlements. ADR-ACT-0254.

patch.summary: Grant or revoke a tenant entitlement (system operator)
patch.description: System-operator-only, audited grant/revoke. Body carries no tenant id (path) and a tenant can never self-grant. ADR-0058 / ADR-ACT-0254.

400.description: Validation error or invalid tenant id

get.description: Operator-facing catalog of backing services + providers with environment classification, visibility, and entitlement linkage. Contains no secrets or provider credentials. ADR-0055 / ADR-ACT-0254.
Lists the tenant's webhook subscriptions (FQDN/session). Never returns the signing secret (only hasSecret). ADR-0051.

post.description: Creates a subscription (audit-first) and returns the signing secret ONCE. Body carries no tenant id; url must be https (http only for localhost). ADR-0051.

400.description: Validation error or no tenant context

get.description: Returns the classified webhooks readiness (no_subscriptions / configured / degraded). Never faked. ADR-0051.

patch.description: Updates url/events/enabled (audit-first). Never returns the secret. ADR-0051.

400.description: Validation error or no tenant context
Validation error or no tenant context

post.description: Generates a new signing secret (audit-first) and returns it ONCE. ADR-0051.

post.summary: Send a test event to a webhook
post.description: Dispatches a signed platform.test event (single immediate attempt; audit-first; recorded in the delivery log). Classified result; never exposes the secret. ADR-0051.

get.description: Lists the most recent delivery attempts for a subscription. ADR-0051.
Returns delivery health counts (total/delivered/failed/dead/pending) + last status/timestamps. Safe metadata only — never payload, headers, or the signing secret. ADR-ACT-0226.

post.description: Requeues a single DEAD delivery as pending (attempt reset, due now); audit-first; idempotent (a non-dead delivery requeues 0). ADR-ACT-0226.

post.summary: Redrive all dead deliveries for a subscription
post.description: Bulk requeue of all DEAD deliveries for the subscription as pending; audit-first. ADR-ACT-0226.

get.summary: Platform operations — local service readiness + workers
get.description: Read-only operator cockpit data: bounded service-specific health checks over a safe local-service allowlist (non-2xx or malformed structured bodies classify as degraded, no response as unreachable) + background-worker heartbeats + environment/version + viewerMode. Never returns secrets, DSNs, or raw env — only known-safe console URLs, classified per the ADR-ACT-0233 clickthrough policy under explicit host authority (ADR-ACT-0236): a tenant-resolved FQDN yields the tenant_operator view (routed tenant-safe links only, for every viewer); a system-admin on the apex host gets the system_operator view (direct-local labelled global links); a system-admin on any other host is refused 403 INVALID_OPERATIONS_ORIGIN. ADR-ACT-0228 / ADR-ACT-0235 / ADR-ACT-0236.

Returns the enterprise control-plane capability inventory (implementation status) with each capability's per-tenant readiness + the aggregated overall status. Tenant-scoped (FQDN/session). Readiness is live-checked or invariant — never faked. ADR-0045.

get.summary: Classify the request host and resolve its tenant
get.description: Public, host-keyed. Returns the host identity classification (apex / tenant_slug / reserved_subdomain / invalid_subdomain / custom_domain_candidate / malformed) and, when the host resolves, the tenant slug + hostSource (slug | custom_domain). Public values only. ADR-ACT-0231/0232.

post.summary: Activate a verified custom domain on the tenant auth client
post.description: Requires DNS-verified ownership; adds the redirect URI + web origin to the tenant Keycloak client, marks auth_client_status active, and consumes the ownership challenge. tenant.domains.write. ADR-ACT-0232.

post.summary: Deactivate a custom domain on the tenant auth client
post.description: Removes the redirect URI + web origin from the tenant Keycloak client; clears canonical and resets routing claims. tenant.domains.write. ADR-ACT-0232.

post.summary: Run the LOCAL reverse-proxy routing probe for a custom domain
post.description: Live probe through the local Caddy: routing_local_active is recorded ONLY when the proxy was reachable AND the response proved the expected tenant context. Local-only; never claims public routing. tenant.domains.write. ADR-ACT-0232.

post.summary: Mark a custom domain canonical for the tenant
post.description: Marks a CANONICAL MARKER (primary display domain) — it never executes a redirect and never implies public cutover; the response carries redirectPolicy=no_redirect and redirectActive=false until a redirect implementation is explicitly proven (ADR-ACT-0236). Guards: verified ownership + active auth client + proven routing. At most one canonical domain per tenant. tenant.domains.write. ADR-ACT-0232.

delete.summary: Unset the canonical flag for a custom domain
